ddls:
CREATE TABLE "image_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the image format (e.g., BMP, EMF, EPS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image format */,
  "is_vector" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the format is vector-based */,
  "is_raster" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the format is raster-based */,
  "is_lossless" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the format supports lossless compression */,
  "color_model" TEXT /* The color model used (e.g., RGB, CMYK) */,
  "max_resolution" TEXT /* Maximum resolution supported by the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the software application (e.g., Java2D, PNG, TIFF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software application */,
  "version" TEXT /* The version of the software application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* The release date of the software application */,
  "developer" TEXT /* The developer or company behind the software application */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* The type of license (e.g., open source, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility" (
  "compat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image format */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software application */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility status (e.g., X, None, X [1]) */,
  "compatibility_level" TEXT /* The level of compatibility (e.g., Full, Partial, None) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the compatibility */,
  "last_tested_date" TEXT /* The last date when the compatibility was tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES software_applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_options" (
  "conv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion option */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source image format */,
  "target_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target image format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conversion option */,
  "quality_setting" TEXT /* The quality setting for the conversion (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "conversion_time" INTEGER /* Average time (in seconds) taken for the conversion */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* The last date when the conversion option was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_options_target_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_options_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image file */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image format */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "original_file_name" TEXT /* The original file name before any conversions */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the image file (e.g., EXIF data) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the file, for versioning purposes */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file has been logically deleted */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the file has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_files_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_files_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The last date when the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the file */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client accessing the file */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration (in seconds) of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES image_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pdf_conversion" (
  "pdf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PDF conversion option */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PDF conversion option */,
  "quality_setting" TEXT /* The quality setting for the PDF conversion (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "conversion_time" INTEGER /* Average time (in seconds) taken for the PDF conversion */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* The last date when the PDF conversion option was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pdf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pdf_conversion_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postscript_conversion" (
  "ps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PostScript conversion option */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PostScript conversion option */,
  "quality_setting" TEXT /* The quality setting for the PostScript conversion (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "conversion_time" INTEGER /* Average time (in seconds) taken for the PostScript conversion */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* The last date when the PostScript conversion option was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postscript_conversion_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pcl_conversion" (
  "pcl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PCL conversion option */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PCL conversion option */,
  "quality_setting" TEXT /* The quality setting for the PCL conversion (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "conversion_time" INTEGER /* Average time (in seconds) taken for the PCL conversion */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* The last date when the PCL conversion option was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pcl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pcl_conversion_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "afp_conversion" (
  "afp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AFP conversion option */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AFP conversion option */,
  "quality_setting" TEXT /* The quality setting for the AFP conversion (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "conversion_time" INTEGER /* Average time (in seconds) taken for the AFP conversion */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* The last date when the AFP conversion option was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("afp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_afp_conversion_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rtf_conversion" (
  "rtf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RTF conversion option */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the RTF conversion option */,
  "quality_setting" TEXT /* The quality setting for the RTF conversion (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "conversion_time" INTEGER /* Average time (in seconds) taken for the RTF conversion */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* The last date when the RTF conversion option was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rtf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rtf_conversion_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id")
)
